backlinks._source: Backlinks API does not expose historical-date snapshots via getBacklinksSummary; only current state is queryable. Delta against this baseline is not computable for backlinks in a historical-compare scenario — see DRIFT-REPORT.md.

page._source: Historical page fingerprint not available — page-level diff is first-capture-only for this historical-compare scenario. See DRIFT-REPORT.md.
